title: Creeper Loading Screen
description: This resource pack replaces the standart Mojang logo at boot with the creeper's face. Optifine required.
body:
![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cb4aca3f8abadb82c6952b77afdf59ddd66434f.png)
The original **Creeper Loading Screen** resourcepack based on my [CurseForge resourcepack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/creeper-loading-screen).

This resource pack replaces the standart Mojang logo at boot with the creeper's face. Optifine required. Enjoy!

_WARNING: versions from 1.19.3 to 1.20.0 inclusive are not supported due to Minecraft bug. Consider using 1.20.1+._

By likespro.
